caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the text "BOSS TALK" in gold lettering, and a gold watch on his left wrist is seated in a recording studio. He is wearing over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. To his left is a white banner featuring a star logo and the phrase "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeated vertically. Behind him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table in front of him is a black mug with red and blue text that includes "BOSS TALK". In the bottom left corner, a small circular logo is visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a fixed position, looking slightly to his left with a serious expression, with very minimal movement in his posture and facial features.
